notes: Sovereign L1 (ACP-77) converted from a permissioned subnet on Fuji. Genesis carries four allowlist precompiles (tx/deployer/native-minter/fee-manager), the PoA validator-manager proxy predeploy at 0x0feedc0de…, and warpConfig (required for the manager to read the P-Chain conversion). Verified live: a BGAS transfer from the deployer mined successfully. Earlier abandoned subnets/chains from the multi-attempt bring-up hold small locked validator balances.
